title: Equipment Technician  (Normal Office Hour)
description:
Location: Kaki Bukit

Summary

You will assemble and test capital equipment products to meet quality standards and specifications. You will maintain safety and housekeeping practices, support quality management processes, and collaborate effectively with team members and supervisors.

Responsibilities

  • Assemble and test products following established process and test instructions to ensure compliance with specifications and quality standards
  • Set up, assemble, test, and debug capital equipment to support production and operational readiness
  • Maintain high standards of safety and housekeeping practices (5S) to ensure a clean and safe work environment
  • Participate in evaluating new products and transferring production processes as assigned to support continuous improvement
  • Support the Quality Management System by following procedures and contributing to quality assurance activities
  • Communicate regularly and effectively with supervisors and team members to coordinate tasks and resolve issues

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Diploma, NTC, or ITC in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering
  • Experience in mechanical or electrical assembly work
  • Experience in equipment setup, assembly, testing, and debugging of capital equipment

All Successful candidates can expect a very competitive remuneration package and a comprehensive range of benefits.

Please email your resume in a detailed MS Word format to joyce@peopleprofilers.com stating

1) Current Drawn

2) Expecting Salary

3) Date Available

4) Reason to Leave each job:

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified

Joyce Koh Ai Leng

People Profilers Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
